about.text: Rahul NS Anand. View Projects (/projects). Read Blogs (/blogs). Contact Rahul (/contact). Work Experience: Senior Software Engineer - Product Engineering (2023 - Present). Own end-to-end feature delivery across web and platform layers. Drive architecture decisions with maintainability and clarity as constraints. Mentor engineers through design reviews and execution planning. Software Engineer - Frontend + DX (2020 - 2023). Built reusable UI systems and introduced typed API boundaries. Reduced bundle and route load costs through targeted performance work. Projects: Developer Portfolio Platform - Personal Product (2025 - Present). Crafting a narrative-first site with intentional interaction design. Balancing expressive visuals with lightweight, accessible implementation. Workflow Automation Toolkit - Internal (2024). Shipped automation scripts that cut repetitive ops tasks by over 50%. Education: Computer Science - Engineering Foundation (2016 - 2020). Focused on systems, software design, and practical product development.
